title: Senior Software Engineer - Honeywell India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Honeywell India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
